_comment: Package display names are fully configurable here. Renaming a package requires NO code changes — edit name only. 'id' is the stable key used by pricing.json and services.json; do not change ids. 'supportModel' states the reactive-vs-proactive support difference on the charts (label = short, for table cells; detail = full sentence, for the catalog header).

packages.name: TCT Basic Care
packages.shortDescription: Essential monitoring, patching, AV/EDR, backup and helpdesk for cost-sensitive clients.

supportModel.label: Reactive
supportModel.detail: System-generated alerts open tickets; remediation is coordinated with you.

packages.name: TCT Standard Care
packages.shortDescription: Basic Care plus Business Standard productivity and stronger collaboration.

supportModel.label: Reactive
supportModel.detail: System-generated alerts open tickets; remediation is coordinated with you.

packages.name: TCT Comprehensive Care
packages.shortDescription: Adds managed SOC, security awareness training, advanced email security and strategic planning.

supportModel.label: Reactive — remediation billed hourly
supportModel.detail: TCT proactively maintains the monitoring, patching and security stack. System alerts open tickets, but remediation waits for your approval and is billed hourly (T&M).

packages.name: TCT Complete Care
packages.shortDescription: Full stack with unlimited support, vCIO, vendor management and complete security.

supportModel.label: Proactive — support included
supportModel.detail: TCT acts on system alerts automatically and proactively; remote support for covered items is included — no hourly billing.

packages.name: TCT Ally (Co-Managed)
packages.shortDescription: Co-managed for clients with internal IT: TCT provides the full tool stack, security, backups, documentation, monitoring and an escalation/after-hours bench. Day-to-day helpdesk, moves/adds/changes and projects are billed at an hourly rate (not bundled).

supportModel.label: Co-managed — labor billed hourly
supportModel.detail: Your internal IT leads day-to-day; TCT provides the tool stack and an escalation/after-hours bench, with helpdesk and project labor billed hourly.
